initial_description: You stir to the soft, persistent humming of cicadas. The air is heavy with the scent of damp moss and crushed mint. As your eyes blink open, the canopy above filters the sunlight into shimmering shafts of gold, illuminating dust motes dancing in the stillness. You are lying on a bed of clover in a perfectly circular clearing, ringed by ancient, silver-barked oaks.
description: The silver oaks of the clearing stand as silent sentinels. The matted clover where you first woke has begun to spring back to life, and the crystalline spring continues its rhythmic bubbling. It is a brief sanctuary of light before the shadows of the deep forest take hold.

initial_description: The transition from the glade is abrupt. Thorny brambles pull at your clothes, and the light dims as the oak trees give way to gnarled, dark-wooded pines. The air here is cooler, smelling of pine needles and old earth.
description: A narrow, shadowed trail winding between thick pines. The ground is uneven, covered in a thick carpet of needles that muffles your footsteps.

initial_description: A shallow stream cuts through the forest here, singing as it splashes over smooth river stones. The water is so clear you can see tiny silver fish darting between the shadows of the reeds. A fallen log provides a natural, albeit slippery, bridge.
description: The gentle sound of running water dominates this small bank. The brook flows from the north and disappears into the thicket to the south.

initial_description: The path widens into a dusty junction. A weathered wooden signpost leans precariously at the center, though the carvings on it have long since rotted away. To the north, you smell the faint, savory scent of woodsmoke.
description: An intersection of three main trails. The trees are thinner here, allowing more sky to be seen. A sense of civilization lies somewhere nearby.
